allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('name:',d.get\('name'\)\); print\('geometryType:',d.get\('geometryType'\)\); print\('maxRecordCount:',d.get\('maxRecordCount'\)\); print\('FIELDS:'\); [print\(' -',f['name'],f['type']\) for f in d.get\('fields',[]\)]")
